prompt: Create a cinematic photorealistic spring street scene in a quiet traditional Japanese neighborhood, shot in landscape 16:9. The view looks down a narrow residential lane lined with old wooden houses, plaster walls, sliding lattice windows, a low wall on the right, and a dark utility pole near the center-right with black-and-yellow safety stripes at its base. Pale pink cherry blossom branches fill the upper left foreground and continue as soft blooming trees into the distance, with delicate petals catching warm morning sunlight. Use shallow depth of field: the foreground blossoms and nearby house details are sharp while the street and background buildings fade into gentle bokeh. Overlay exactly 1 large white Japanese kanji character in the center, reading 花, set in a bold elegant Mincho-style serif calligraphic font with clean high-contrast strokes. The character should be opaque white, vertically and horizontally centered, large enough to dominate the composition while still allowing blossoms and the street to remain visible around and behind it. Atmosphere: serene, nostalgic, airy, early spring in Kyoto-like backstreets, natural colors, soft highlights, realistic photography, no people, no vehicles, no extra text.
